issues.description: Hook with fetch mutation has no test file. Covers a permission-sensitive operation (PUT /api/admin/users/:id/permissions). Missing test for: success case, error case (non-ok response), and query invalidation behavior.
issues.rule: Every hook in application/hooks/ should have a corresponding .test.ts(x)

issues.description: Mutation hook for toggling user permissions (POST /api/admin/users/:id/permissions) has no test file. Security-sensitive: controls access grants. Missing coverage for: grant=true, grant=false, error handling, cache invalidation.
issues.rule: Every hook in application/hooks/ should have a corresponding .test.ts(x)

issues.description: Query hook that fetches granted permission keys via fetch API has no test file. Missing coverage for: enabled=false when userId is null, successful fetch, error state when response.ok is false.
issues.rule: Every hook in application/hooks/ should have a corresponding .test.ts(x)

issues.description: Query hook that fetches user profile via Supabase, with enabled guard on userId, has no test. Missing coverage for: null userId disables query, successful data return.
issues.rule: Every hook in application/hooks/ should have a corresponding .test.ts(x)

issues.description: Hook has no test file. Part of the delegates/admin user management flow.
issues.rule: Every hook in application/hooks/ should have a corresponding .test.ts(x)

issues.description: Query hook for dashboard recent activity has no test file. No coverage for staleTime behavior or Supabase error propagation.
issues.rule: Every hook in application/hooks/ should have a corresponding .test.ts(x)

issues.description: useProducts hook (TanStack Query wrapping fetchProducts) has no test. Used in ProductListPage which has a page-level test but no hook-level test for filter variations.
issues.rule: Hooks with non-trivial filter/query logic should have unit tests

issues.description: Contains three mutation hooks (useToggleProduct, useDeleteProduct, useReorderProducts) with no test file. Query invalidation behavior after each mutation is not covered.
issues.rule: Mutation hooks should be tested for success/error paths and cache invalidation

issues.description: Product form hook (likely complex state/validation) has no test file.
issues.rule: Form hooks with non-trivial logic should have unit tests

issues.description: useDelegates hook has no test file. Tested indirectly via page-level tests but no unit isolation.
issues.rule: Query hooks should have unit tests

issues.description: Mutation hook for delegate management has no test file.
issues.rule: Mutation hooks should be tested for success/error paths and cache invalidation

issues.description: Complex hook using useSyncExternalStore + Supabase seller profiles + i18n field resolution. Handles hydration, empty cart, seller grouping, and subtotal computation. No direct test file exists (cartCookie infrastructure is tested but not this hook's logic).
issues.rule: Hooks with complex derived state should have unit tests covering edge cases

issues.description: Utility function with branching logic (window path detection) has no test. Two distinct cases: server-side (no window) and client-side /admin prefix detection.
issues.rule: Pure utility functions with branching logic should have unit tests

issues.description: LandingPage has no test file. Only HomeSections component is tested. The page composition itself (CtaSection, HeroSection, RolesSection) is not covered.
issues.rule: Page components should have at minimum a smoke/render test

missingTests.reason: Admin permission query with enabled guard
User profile fetch with null guard
Product query with filter param variations
Complex derived state with multiple edge cases
Simple utility but branching logic is untested

patterns.description: Excellent test coverage overall. The majority of hooks, utils, components, and pages have corresponding test files. The glob-compare shows a mature testing culture.
examples: apps/payments/src/features/checkout/ — all hooks, infra, components, and pages tested
apps/admin/src/features/audit/ — full layer coverage including domain constants
apps/admin/src/features/templates/ — consistent test files at every layer

patterns.description: Security-critical path (checkout payment methods, stock validation) has dedicated tests: useSellerPaymentMethods.test.tsx tests the hasStockIssues response path explicitly.
Good async test patterns observed — tests use waitFor() and renderHook correctly with QueryClientProvider wrappers.

Admin users feature has the highest concentration of untested hooks: useApplyTemplate, useTogglePermission, useUserPermissions, useUserProfile, useUserDelegates — all permission-related operations without unit tests.

Studio app hooks are underrepresented in tests compared to other apps. Out of ~10 application hooks, only 3 have test files (useAutoResize, useLangToggle, useDelegateSearch). The remaining 7 hooks lack tests.
useSupabaseAuth hook is duplicated across all 6+ apps but none have a test for it. While it may be a simple wrapper, auth hooks are high-value test candidates.
ProtectedRoute component exists in 5 apps (admin, payments, playground, store, studio) but none have test files.
